sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35204" key="e)ndiaste/llomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνδια-στέλλομαι</orth>, <sense id="n35204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">distinguish clearly</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.4a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
